message:
feat(abi): delegate getaliasbyname and getaliasbyname_r to host libc via runtime dlsym

- Replace native stub implementations of getaliasbyname() and
  getaliasbyname_r() with runtime dlsym delegation via
  resolve_host_symbol_raw(), matching the pattern established for other
  NSS functions (hostent, netent, protoent, etc.)
- Both functions now set errno to ENOENT on miss (either from host libc
  or from the local fallback when the symbol is unavailable), ensuring
  consistent error signaling with glibc behavior
- Add alias_lookup_missing_entry_sets_errno test verifying both the plain
  and reentrant variants return NULL/ENOENT for nonexistent aliases, with
  a local AliasEnt repr(C) struct for the reentrant result buffer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
